howItWorks.title: How It Works

step1.title: Upload Data
step1.description: Share crop images, soil data, or farm details through our intuitive interface.

step2.title: AI Analysis
step2.description: Our advanced AI models analyze your data using cutting-edge machine learning algorithms.

step3.title: Smart Recommendation
step3.description: Receive personalized recommendations, predictions, and actionable insights.

step4.title: Improved Farming
step4.description: Make data-driven decisions that improve yield, reduce costs, and maximize profit.
